nasb.text: Moreover, he shall speak for you to the people; and he will be as a mouth for you and you will be as God to him.

esv.text: He shall speak for you to the people, and he shall be your mouth, and you shall be as God to him.

cnv.text: 他要替你向人民說話，他要作你的口，你要作他的　神。

ccb.text: 他要替你向百姓说话，做你的发言人，你对他来说就像上帝一样。
